zh.Carcassonne, Aude, Languedoc-Roussillon,: 法國藍多-盧希隆奧德卡爾卡頌
zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun於1159年之前出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun19歲，母親Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche13歲。他和Adelicia Nevers至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於大約1218年。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun于1159年之前出生在法国諾門迪时，他的父亲Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun19岁，母亲Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche13岁。他和Adelicia Nevers至少有5个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于大约1218年。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Geoffroy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun was born before 1159, in Normandy, France, his father, Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun, was 19 and his mother, Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche, was 13. He had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with Adelicia Nevers. He died about 1218.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun est né avant 1159, à Normandie, France, son père, Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche, avait 13 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles avec Adelicia Nevers. Il est décédé environ 1218.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun vor 1159 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun 19 und seine Mutter Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche 13. Er hatte mit Adelicia Nevers mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb um 1218.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun è nato il prima del 1159 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche, aveva 13 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie con Adelicia Nevers. Morì circa 1218.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudunが1159年以前にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudunは19歳，母Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guercheは13歳であった。彼はAdelicia Neversとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1218年に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun(이)가 1159년 이전 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche(은)는 13세였다. 그는 Adelicia Nevers(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1218년 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun nasceu antes 1159, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche, tinha 13 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas com Adelicia Nevers. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1218.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun родился перед 1159 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche, 13. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от Adelicia Nevers. Он умер около 1218 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun nació antes de 1159, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Hugh VI Viscount of Châteaudun, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Preuilly sur Claise Dame de la Guerche, tenía 13 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas con Adelicia Nevers. Murió aproximadamente 1218.
